prompt: Ultra-wide cinematic banner (16:5 ratio). A dramatic close-up of a molar with a metallic filling biting down on a crumpled scrap of aluminium foil; a faint electric arc of light jumps between the foil and the filling, with a subtle nerve glowing beneath the tooth suggesting a jolt of pain. The mood is 'an accidental battery in your mouth'. Photorealistic-cinematic style, cool cyan spark against warm tooth tones, near-black background (#0a0a0a). No text.
alt: A close-up of a tooth with a metal filling biting a scrap of aluminium foil, a faint spark of current arcing between foil and filling

prompt: Anatomical-style illustration on a dark background (#0a0a0a) of a molar tooth with a metallic filling, biting down on a folded scrap of aluminium foil. Label the foil 'anode: Al → Al³⁺ + 3e⁻'; label the filling 'cathode (Ag/Sn/Hg): O₂ + 4H⁺ + 4e⁻ → 2H₂O'; label the surrounding liquid 'saliva (electrolyte)'; show an electron-flow arrow from foil to filling and a nerve beneath the tooth. Orange accent labels and leader lines, clean technical-medical illustration style. No bright background.
alt: Diagram of a tooth with a filling biting aluminium foil: foil labelled anode with Al -> Al3+ + 3e-, filling labelled cathode with O2 + 4H+ + 4e- -> 2H2O, saliva as electrolyte, nerve below

prompt: Technical illustration on a dark background (#0a0a0a) of a beaker of chloride solution with a silver rod descending into it; the lower part of the rod is coated with a thin matte layer labelled 'AgCl coating'. Label: 'Ag rod', 'AgCl coating', 'Cl⁻ (aq)'. Show the surface equilibrium 'AgCl ⇌ Ag⁺ + Cl⁻' as a small annotation at the coating. Orange accent labels and leader lines, clean technical illustration style. No bright background.
alt: A silver rod coated with a purple-grey AgCl layer dipping into a KCl/chloride solution, labelled Ag rod, AgCl coating, Cl- (aq)

prompt: Ultra-wide cinematic banner (16:5 ratio). Two metal electrode plates dipping into a beaker of pale solution, with tiny glowing positive and negative ions drifting in opposite directions between them and faint threads of electric current arcing across the gap. The mood is 'invisible ions quietly carrying a current'. Clean photorealistic-technical style, cool blue and cyan electrical glow with a few warm ion highlights, on a near-black background (#0a0a0a). No text.
alt: Glowing ions drifting between two immersed electrodes in a beaker, faint current threads connecting them

prompt: Technical illustration on a dark background (#0a0a0a) of a single transparent cube of electrolyte solution, 1 cm on each edge, drawn in 3D. A '+' electrode plate covers the left face and a '−' electrode plate covers the right face, 1 cm apart. Inside the cube show a few small glowing '+' and '−' ions drifting between the plates. Label: edge = 1 cm, face area = 1 cm², 'conductance of this cube = specific conductance (κ)'. Orange accent labels and thin leader lines, clean technical illustration style. No bright background.
alt: A transparent 1 cm cube of electrolyte solution with positive and negative ions inside, a + electrode on one face and a − electrode on the opposite face, labelled 1 cm edges and area = 1 cm squared

prompt: Ultra-wide cinematic banner (16:5 ratio). A tall transparent column of water held between two large vertical electrode plates, with exactly one 'packet' of dissolved electrolyte spreading its glowing positive and negative ions to fill the whole volume. The mood is 'measuring the conducting power of a fixed amount of substance'. Clean photorealistic-technical style, cool blue and cyan glow with a few warm ion highlights, on a near-black background (#0a0a0a). No text.
alt: One mole of an electrolyte spreading its ions through a tall column of water between two large plates

prompt: Technical illustration on a dark background (#0a0a0a) of a 3D block built from many identical 1 cm cubes of electrolyte solution stacked together (e.g. a 3×3 arrangement), sandwiched between two large electrode plates 1 cm apart. A single cube is highlighted and labelled 'conductance of 1 cube = κ'. An arrow indicates the whole block 'volume V = 1000/M cm³ holds 1 mole'. Caption-style label: 'Λ = κ × V'. Orange accent labels and thin leader lines, clean technical illustration style. No bright background.
alt: A block of stacked 1 cm cubes of solution forming the volume V that contains exactly one mole of electrolyte, between two electrode plates, illustrating Λ = κ × V

prompt: Ultra-wide cinematic banner (16:5 ratio). On the left a crowded cluster of glowing ions barely moving; flowing to the right they spread apart and stream freely toward electrodes, with a faint rising curve overlaid suggesting 'conductivity per mole climbing'. The mood is 'freedom with dilution'. Clean photorealistic-technical style, cool blue and cyan glow with warm ion highlights, near-black background (#0a0a0a). No text.
alt: Ions spreading apart as a solution is diluted, each moving more freely, with a rising curve overlaid

prompt: Technical illustration on a dark background (#0a0a0a): two side-by-side line graphs, both with y-axis 'Λm' and x-axis '√C'. LEFT graph labelled 'strong electrolyte (e.g. KCl)': a gently downward-sloping near-straight line that, extrapolated, meets the y-axis at a marked point 'Λ°m'. RIGHT graph labelled 'weak electrolyte (e.g. CH₃COOH)': a curve that is low and flat at higher √C then sweeps steeply upward as √C approaches 0, with a dashed gap showing it 'cannot be extrapolated'. Orange accent labels, axis labels and the Λ°m marker, clean technical line-graph style. No bright background.
alt: Two graphs of molar conductivity versus square root of concentration: left a strong electrolyte as a gently sloping straight line meeting the y-axis at Λ°m; right a weak electrolyte curving sharply upward as concentration approaches zero

prompt: Ultra-wide cinematic banner (16:5 ratio). A glass conductivity cell holding two dark platinised-platinum electrode plates, wired into a diamond-shaped Wheatstone bridge circuit with a small AC source and a null detector, faint alternating-current waveforms glowing along the wires. The mood is 'measuring resistance without disturbing the solution'. Clean photorealistic-technical style, cool blue and cyan electrical glow on a near-black background (#0a0a0a). No text.
alt: A conductivity cell with two platinized platinum electrodes wired into a balanced bridge circuit with an AC source
